'''hasulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidocil|cnidocil]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidocil|cnidocil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hasulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæsilith|hæsilith]] || [[word:hæsilij|hæsilij]] || [[word:hæsilish|hæsilish]] || [[word:hæsili|hæsili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hasusuluth|hasusuluth]] || [[word:hasusuluj|hasusuluj]] || [[word:hasusulush|hasusulush]] || [[word:hasusulu|hasusulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hasuluth|hasuluth]] || [[word:hasuluj|hasuluj]] || [[word:hasulush|hasulush]] || [[word:hasulu|hasulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hasufluth|hasufluth]] || [[word:hasufluj|hasufluj]] || [[word:hasuflush|hasuflush]] || [[word:hasufluf|hasufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hasuluthu|hasuluthu]] || [[word:hasuluju|hasuluju]] || [[word:hasulushu|hasulushu]] || [[word:hasuluku|hasuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hasuluth|hasuluth]] || [[word:hasuluj|hasuluj]] || [[word:hasulush|hasulush]] || [[word:hasulu|hasulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hasuluthul|hasuluthul]] || [[word:hasulujul|hasulujul]] || [[word:hasulushul|hasulushul]] || [[word:hasulukul|hasulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hasuluthuthu|hasuluthuthu]] || [[word:hasulujuju|hasulujuju]] || [[word:hasulushushu|hasulushushu]] || [[word:hasuluku|hasuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hasuluthun|hasuluthun]] || [[word:hasulujun|hasulujun]] || [[word:hasulushun|hasulushun]] || [[word:hasulukun|hasulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hasuluthuoro|hasuluthuoro]] || [[word:hasulujuoro|hasulujuoro]] || [[word:hasulushuoro|hasulushuoro]] || [[word:hasulukuoro|hasulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
